positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) surrounded by flowing ribbons of pure starlight. The fox has an ethereal, elegant silhouette with nine tails, rendered in deep indigo and silver gradients. The composition is highly central, featuring the fox seated majestically on a stylized crescent moon. The background is a dark nebula wash, accented by constellations that form recognizable, simple geometric patterns. Style should be neo-traditional Japanese woodblock print meets modern cosmic aesthetic. Use strong contrast and clean lines. Lighting is dramatic, emanating softly from the fox itself, creating a glow against the dark background. Perfect for apparel printing, clean edges, vector quality, high detail.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, low detail, messy background, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, grainy, out of focus
